text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I see, I see! So this summer, you wish to remake
yourself as racer worthy of bearing your fans'
expectations, is that it?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I was hoping you'd know how I could do
that...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
At times like these, there's only one answer—you
go FULL BAKUSHIN!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If all Kitasan Black needed was a boost to her
energy, that answer would suffice, but she needs
more than that now...
choice_data_list:
Why don't you ask the other students for advice
tonight?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Sure! Thanks for the advice, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, that evening, Kitasan Black, Vodka, and
Gold Ship all head to a little ramen restaurant.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, so nobody's expecting anything from you,
huh... Yeah, getting ignored and shoved to the
sidelines sucks.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah, it was the same in my village.
Hey, lady! Gimme another serving of noodles!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The pair of outliers listen attentively to Kitasan
Black's woes.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I've wanted to be helpful and live up to the hopes
and dreams that folks have placed on me since I
was little.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's why I'm so unused to feeling unneeded and
unnecessary. In fact, I feel like I'm just in
everyone's way...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Well, that all depends on how you look at it. Not
having any expectations placed on you has its
upsides as well.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing cooler than being able to stay
under everyone's radar and steal a race out of
nowhere!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Stealing a race out of nowhere... You really think
that's something worth doing, Vodka?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. If it were me, I'd be a real sleeper agent,
waiting for just the right moment to strike!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And the second I do, I'd shake things right up
with everything I got! That's how I live my life.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I'd do the same thing.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: You too, Golshi?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Yep. In fact, I'd go even bigger and do things nobody expected me to do and really stir up a fuss! That's my way of living!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You don't do anything like that, do you? Like
strike a pose right out the starting gate?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I don't, and I don't think I ever will!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship's "advice" aside, it's certainly true that
having no expectations on you opens up the
perfect opportunity to prove people wrong.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I can be like you two, though. I
mean, it's just...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Amazing. Just when the crowd least expects it,
you guys thrust yourselves into the spotlight in a
way they can't ignore!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Well, changing the way you live isn't easy. Heck,
there's no need to do something so drastic
anyway.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If you live life by shouldering people's
expectations and doing your best to meet them
all...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Then why don't you try to figure out why people
aren't expecting anything from you in the first
place?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I guess that's a good place to start...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yep. If you're not showing up on anyone's radars, then you've gotta figure out how to grab their attention and make them see you.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, as they say, the world is yours for the
taking. But as they also say, what's yours is mine.
That's just how it is.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I see... That's certainly one way to look at it. If
people aren't paying attention to me, then I have
to find a way to make them notice me...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for your advice! Now I just
need to decide what I'm going to do next.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad you got something out of this talk. Oh,
by the way!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
How was I today? Was I the coolest mentor ever,
or what?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hold up! I'm the cool one here tonight! I was the
one who brought us to this ramen shop, after all!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You agree, don'tcha, lady? How else could they
have found this hidden gem?

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
I can't say you're wrong. You're always bringing
folks along to this little hole in the wall of ours.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
H-how about we just say that you were both
cool?

text_block_list.name: Vodka and Golshi
text_block_list.text: No way! Choose which one of us was cooler!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know how we got embroiled in this strange
popularity contest, but if I had to say whose
philosophy was more influential, I'd say...
choice_data_list: Gold Ship and her unconventional methods.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeaaah, buddy! You get it! Like they say, great
things come when you least expect it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Okay, Kitasan! Time to smash down the door
blocking your way! Hup, hup, hi-yaaah! Nail it
with your knee!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes, ma'am! I'll be sure to use a bit of force
whenever the situation calls for it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship's forceful way of living seems to have
inspired Kitasan Black quite a bit.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: But how am I supposed to gain attention?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Of course it was me! My lifestyle struck a
chord with you, eh?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I can tell you all about what it means to have true
heart!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Thank you! That would be great!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka's rebellious spirit helps fill Kitasan Black
with courage.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: But how am I supposed to gain attention?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
If nobody's ever expected anything from me and
their opinions don't change even after I've given
it my all, what else can I do?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I think the ramen shop lady can answer that
better than me.
Well? Whaddaya think?

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
Good question. I suppose things are bound to
work out in the end so long as you keep trying,
even if no one's paying you any attention.

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
You know, this shop wasn't always this popular. It
slowly grew busy over time. Take a look at those
photos on the wall.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Wow, they're all pictures of Umamusume! You're
there too, Golshi! What are they there for?

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
Those are all Umamusume who've supported us
over years. Every single one of them visited us
during their summer camps.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the shop closes, we head to the beach and
the lady from the ramen shop shares her story
with us.

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
At first, nobody came to our restaurant at all. But
over time, Umamusume would occasionally come
in for a bite to eat.

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
Then, things slowly became more and more lively.
Of course I was happy with the change...

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
But the more racers who came to eat at our shop,
the more I saw them cry. And goodness, so many
of them would cry...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Really?

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
Really. Among the Umamusume who came to eat,
there were those who couldn't win any races and
failed to make a name for themselves...

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Lady
text_block_list.text: One racer in particular had amazing potential, and she even managed to almost win in a big race... key word there being almost.

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
I thought that she might just up and quit one day,
but she still showed up here every year. It was
such a relief every time I saw her.

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
She slowly gained attention little by little, and
when she finally won her first G1 race, my, what a
commotion we made for her!

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume like her have always been patrons to
our humble little ramen shop.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Wow, that's amazing... How long did it take her
to win a G1 race?

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Lady
text_block_list.text: Well, let's see... About five years.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Five years?!

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
Yes. She once told me that the Twinkle Series was
like a long journey for her.

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
That the only way to reach the finish line was to
run to the very end. That all she could do was to
keep believing in herself and take one step after
another.

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
I'll never forget that day... The way all the other
Umamusume in the room looked as they slurped
their noodles and listened to her speak...

text_block_list.name: Ramen Store Lady
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me, Golshi. You were a bawling
mess when she finally won that race...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
No, I wasn't! I'm tellin' ya, that was just 'cause
some pepper had gotten into my ears!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
No matter how hopeless it seemed, she kept at it
for five whole years...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Even though, deep down, I'm sure she was super
frustrated with herself.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
So many more Umamusume in the same situation
must've eaten at that ramen shop...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tears glimmer in Kitasan Black's eyes as she looks
up at the Milky Way, her gaze tracking its path
across the sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black is quiet as she reflects on the
feelings of those who walked the same path
before us. We walk in their footsteps now, and
someday, her successor will follow in hers.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I'm... I'm so pathetic.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I knew all along what I needed to do in order to
grab people's attention! I knew it all this time!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I don't have anything near a reputable enough
track record to my name! I mean, I've only been
running for one year!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But the Umamusume we heard about ran for five
years before she made it. Five years! And there
are countless others like her!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yet here I am, complaining...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black directs all her frustration at herself
and how she let such an insignificant worry stop
her in her tracks yesterday.
choice_data_list:
Guess we'll just have to grab everyone's
attention from now on.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Let's. I'm not going to whine anymore. I'm
just gonna focus on running well and winning my
races!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I want to keep showing people that I'm worthy of
standing upon the sands of this shore!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I swear upon this ocean and these waves that I'm
not going to back down! Not even a single step!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to become just as great an Umamusume
as those who came before me!
